modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be distracting grammar usage and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Unable to access Library Databases through web browsers.

full_description_text:  
I’m having trouble reaching the Library Databases while using Google Chrome and Apple Safari. Every time I try to load EBSCO, I get an error saying the site can't be reached. It’s really frustrating because I need to access these online research databases for my work. I also saw a message about an EZproxy Server Error, which makes me think there’s something wrong on the server side.
short_description: Unable to access Library Databases through web browsers.
